message:
fix(tui,analysis): fix word boundary matching and graph/insights mode navigation

analysis/git_history.rs:
- Rename has_word_prefix() → has_word_token() for clarity: now checks
  both start AND end boundaries to prevent false matches (e.g.,
  "closedown" no longer matches "closed")
- Improve event-type inference to handle "reopened" and "claimed" as
  complete tokens
- Add comprehensive unit tests for boundary cases

tui.rs:
- Fix graph/insights mode toggling to re-rank and reselect the first
  visible item instead of retaining stale selection from previous mode
- Add sync_ranked_list_context() and reselect_ranked_list_context()
  helpers for mode-aware selection management
- Add insights_visible_issue_indices_for_list_nav() for ranked
  enumeration per insights panel
- Add 4 integration tests validating graph/insights navigation

Beads history rotation: old .br_history snapshots replaced with current.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
